ik:product.dc:title: MULIG Clothes rack
ik:product.dc:description: Say goodbye to piles of messy clothes. With this versatile clothes rack and a few hangers, you can easily organize your shirts, blouses, and trousers in a neat, orderly row. Engineered for ultimate placement flexibility, it is perfectly safe to use anywhere in your home, including damp environments like bathrooms and covered balconies. Additionally, the integrated plastic feet ensure your floor surfaces remain well-protected against scratches.
ik:product.ik:multifunctionality: This modern clothes rack delivers exceptional multi-functional utility throughout the home. Beyond acting as a standard wardrobe organizer for shirts, blouses, and trousers, its specialized weather-resistant construction allows it to safely transition into humid environments, doubling as an effective drying rack in bathrooms or on covered balconies. Additionally, the open, accessible design serves as a sleek temporary garment station for guests or an easy-access display for daily outerwear essentials.
